commit.message:
Refactor AI provider and model handling across components

- Updated type definitions to use AIProvider for provider and model fields.
- Enhanced AIAssistant to disable provider and model selection when messages exist.
- Added model field to context and request structures in ChatContext.
- Adjusted LangChainAgent to default to 'openai/gpt-3.5-turbo' model.

Enhance AI provider support and model selection in AIAssistant and ChatContext

- Added 'openrouter' as a new AI provider option.
- Updated model selection logic to dynamically populate models based on the selected provider.
- Improved API key setup handling with a cancel option.
- Refactored state management for provider and model in ChatContext.
- Adjusted type definitions to accommodate new provider and model structures.

Merge pull request #104 from Jpalm20/main

MySQL DB Support

commit.message: support multiple schema in postgres connection

feat: add MySQL database support

- Implement MySQL database manager with full connection and query support
- Add MySQL intellisense provider with MySQL-specific keywords and functions
- Fix database field handling for MySQL connections (no default database)
- Support MySQL SSL/TLS connections with proper configuration
- Add MySQL to database factory and supported types
- Include mysql2 package for MySQL connectivity
- Ensure MySQL queries respect row limits like other database types

MySQL connections now work with proper authentication, SSL support,
and maintain the same query behavior as PostgreSQL and ClickHouse.

feat: add MySQL database support

- Implement MySQL database manager with full connection and query support
- Add MySQL intellisense provider with MySQL-specific keywords and functions
- Fix database field handling for MySQL connections (no default database)
- Support MySQL SSL/TLS connections with proper configuration
- Add MySQL to database factory and supported types
- Include mysql2 package for MySQL connectivity
- Ensure MySQL queries respect row limits like other database types

MySQL connections now work with proper authentication, SSL support,
and maintain the same query behavior as PostgreSQL and ClickHouse.

Merge pull request #80 from sathvik-palley/enhancement/support-postgresql

enhancement: Add PostgreSQL Database Support to DataPup

commit.message:
fix: correct PostgreSQL database manager interface compliance

- Fix getDatabases() return type to match interface contract
- Fix getTables() return type to return proper success/message object
- Fix getTableSchema() to return interface-compliant response
- Add missing getTableFullSchema() and cleanup() methods
- Fix QueryResult properties to match interface
- Improve read-only connection validation
- Add proper null safety checks for query results

This resolves database explorer not displaying databases/tables for PostgreSQL connections.

refactor: remove wrapper logic from DatabaseManager, return direct responses from database instances

- Remove generic message wrapping in getDatabases() and getTables()
- Return raw responses from specific database manager instances
- Allow database-specific error messages and details
- Address PR feedback to maintain architectural consistency

commit.message:
feat: add loading spinner to connection cards

- Add loading state tracking with loadingConnectionId in App component
- Pass loading state to MainPanel and filter to specific connection card
- Implement loading spinner that only shows on selected connection
- Add loading class to connection cards with proper CSS styling
- Center spinner both horizontally and vertically within card
- Style spinner with accent color to match theme
- Prevent interaction with loading cards using pointer-events: none
- Add fade-in animation for smooth loading state transition

This improves UX by providing clear visual feedback when connecting
to a database, showing which specific connection is being processed.

feat: add comprehensive PostgreSQL database support

- Add PostgreSQL client dependencies (pg and @types/pg)
- Implement PostgreSQL database manager with full CRUD operations
- Add PostgreSQL connection support with SSL/TLS encryption
- Register PostgreSQL provider in database factory
- Update connection UI to support PostgreSQL with SSL checkbox
- Add comprehensive PostgreSQL intellisense provider
- Support PostgreSQL-specific keywords, functions, and data types
- Fix database manager to properly handle return formats
- Add PostgreSQL-specific query table implementation
- Support proper schema qualification for PostgreSQL tables

Feature/sql intellisense

verification.payload:
tree 19603d73a68422f3be15125f452996b4d93b4d28
parent 458c918444fc0f63bb4efaa295acacbe3b3804b2
parent 86a8026b829b2785ca26033db5615063e73dc00f
author Krishnachaitanyakc <krishnabkc15@gmail.com> 1753509726 -0700
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1753509726 -0700

Merge pull request #67 from DataPupOrg/feature/sql-intellisense

Feature/sql intellisense

commit.message:
fix: resolve cmd+enter shortcut and autocompletion text replacement issues

- Fix cmd+enter keyboard shortcut not executing queries by using ref callback pattern
- Fix autocompletion not replacing partial text by calculating proper word range
- Add word range calculation to IntellisenseProvider for correct text replacement
- Update all suggestion methods to use calculated range instead of cursor position
- Wrap executeQuery and handleExecuteQuery in useCallback to prevent closure issues

refactor: replace QueryEditor with SqlEditor component

- Create focused SqlEditor component for SQL editing with intellisense
- Remove unused QueryEditor component and its styles
- Integrate SqlEditor into QueryWorkspace to eliminate code duplication
- Fix TypeScript errors in intellisense implementation
- Add required range property to Monaco completion items
- Update documentation to reflect new architecture

feat: implement database-agnostic SQL intellisense

- Add IntellisenseProvider base class with context-aware suggestions
- Create DatabaseSchemaCache for efficient metadata caching
- Implement SQLContextParser to understand cursor position context
- Add ClickHouse-specific intellisense adapter with custom functions/keywords
- Integrate intellisense with Monaco Editor in QueryEditor component
- Add IPC handlers for fetching connection metadata including database type
- Support keyword, table, column, and function suggestions based on context
- Cache schema information with configurable timeout (default 5 minutes)

This provides context-aware SQL intellisense that adapts to different databases

feat: enhance database explorer UI with Radix icons and hover effects

- Replace text chevrons with ChevronRightIcon/ChevronDownIcon from Radix UI
- Add TableIcon for table items instead of text character
- Show reload button only on hover to reduce visual clutter
- Improve icon alignment and sizing for better visual consistency

Creates a cleaner, more professional interface that follows modern UI patterns.

fix: improve database explorer UX by separating expand/collapse from selection

- Only chevron icons expand/collapse items, not the entire row
- Double-click on table name opens it without toggling expansion
- Prevent text selection on double-click with user-select: none
- Add cursor pointer to chevron icons for better affordance

This prevents the confusing behavior where double-clicking would both
open the table and toggle column visibility.

Merge pull request #66 from DataPupOrg/refactor/database-agnostic-filtering

refactor: move SQL query building from UI to database adapters

commit.message:
refactor: move SQL query building from UI to database adapters

- Add queryTable method to database interface and implementations
- Move filter-to-SQL logic from TableView to database-specific adapters
- ClickHouse adapter uses backticks and proper escaping
- Base implementation provides default SQL Standard syntax
- Update IPC handlers and window API types
- Refactor TableView to use abstract filter options instead of SQL

This makes the codebase more scalable for adding new database types
as each adapter can implement its own SQL dialect and query building logic.
chore: move documentation files to docs folder and cleanup root directory
perf: json viewer editing

commit.message:
fix: prevent connection menu button from being hidden by long connection names

- Add flex container with proper constraints to connection name area
- Implement text truncation with ellipsis for long connection names
- Add title attribute to show full name on hover
- Ensure menu button always has reserved space with flex-shrink: 0
- Fix layout to maintain consistent card appearance
Add conditional styling for Electron vs Web cards, enabling future platform-specific UI improvements

releases.name: v0.0.2-alpha
releases.body:
##  🎉 Features
  - PostgreSQL Support - Full PostgreSQL database support is now available! Connect to your PostgreSQL databases with complete functionality including pagination, bulk operations, and more.
  - Edit Connection - You can now edit saved database connections without recreating them
  - AI Chat History - AI assistant chat history is now preserved when switching between views
  - Loading States - Added loading spinners to connection cards for better UX
  - Keyboard Shortcuts - New query tab shortcut updated to Cmd/Ctrl+N

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
  - Fixed connection card layout misalignment issues
  - Fixed native module compatibility issues with electron-rebuild
  - Improved error handling with new logger utility

## 🔧 Improvements
  - Replaced emojis with Lucide icons for better consistency
  - Improved connection card UI with better field organization
  - Enhanced error logging throughout the application
  - Better TypeScript type definitions

## 👏 New Contributors
* @sathvik-palley made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataPupOrg/DataPup/pull/52 - PostgreSQL support, bug fixes, and UI improvements
* @aayam-bajaj made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataPupOrg/DataPup/pull/62 - Bug fixes
* @Jpalm20 made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataPupOrg/DataPup/pull/79 - Edit connection feature and loading states
* @harshi2218 made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataPupOrg/DataPup/pull/85 - Connection card UI improvements

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DataPupOrg/DataPup/commits/v0.0.2-alpha

readme_html:
DataPup

A modern, AI-assisted, cross-platform database client.

DataPup Overview

DataPup is an open-source database client designed to make database management intuitive and enjoyable. With AI-powered query assistance and a beautiful, accessible interface, it's the database tool that developers actually want to use.

Database Support

Currently Supported

  • ClickHouse - Full support with optimized query execution
  • PostgreSQL - Complete support for the world's most advanced open source database

Coming Soon (Available in 2 weeks)

  • MySQL - Full compatibility with MySQL and MariaDB
  • SQLite - Local database support for development and testing

Development

Prerequisites

  • Node.js 18+
  • npm, yarn, or pnpm

Getting Started

  1. Install dependencies:

    npm install

  2. Run in development mode:

    npm run dev

  3. Build for production:

    npm run build

  4. Create distributable:

    npm run dist

Contributing

We love your input! Check out our Contributing Guide to get started.

If you find DataPup useful, please consider giving it a star on GitHub!

License

This project is MIT licensed - use it however you want! See the LICENSE file for details.

Acknowledgments

  • Built with Electron
  • UI powered by Radix UI
  • Bundled with Vite
  • AI assistance powered by LangChain

Contact

Have questions? Open an issue or reach out to the community!
